title: Resonance Tools!
description: Replace Minecraft tools to Half-Life weapons!
body:
**THAT DOES PACK DO?**

- This texturepack replacing vanilla weapons to Half-Life, HL: Opposing Force and Half-Life 2's weapons, also add HL2 SFX Sounds

**THAT DOES PACK REPLACED:**
- Wooden Sword >> Stunstick (From HL2)﻿﻿

- Stone Sword >> Knife (From HL: Opposing Force)

- Iron Sword >> Leadpipe (From HL2, its weapon for NPC, it used Manhack Matt and Eli Vance in HL2:EP2's ending)

- Golden Sword >> Socket Wrench (Must be Alyx Vance's symbol weapon in HL2 Beta)

- Diamond Sword >> Pipewrench (From HL: Opposing Force)

- Netherite Sword >> Crowbar (You know from that game it is)

- Bow >> USP Match (From HL2)

- Crossbow >> Resistance Crossbow (From HL2)

- Shield >> Wallhammer Shield (From HL: Alyx)

**REQUIREMENTS:**

﻿- Optifine or CIT resewn

**SUPPORT:﻿**

﻿https://boosty.to/nzjunkanddonatelol/posts/21bb8c78-7e6e-43ef-a97b-ed124a2d0f45


**MY SOCIALS:**

Discord: https://discord.gg/TZFzAWBx4y


**ALSO TRY @﻿BigJonny456'S "betabinoculars" pack!** -

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/half-life-2-beta-binoculars-from-2001/
